text: All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of 2-unit multi-family properties of a similar location, GBA, quality, condition, and age. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 3.9% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, lack of a garage, and lack of an enclosed porch. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, view, GBA, cooling system, lack of a garage, and lack of an enclosed porch. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its location, view, age, GBA, lack of a garage, and lack of an enclosed porch. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of market value.
